description_long: This house features a modern, boxy design with a combination of flat and gable roofs. The exterior is predominantly white with large, industrial-style windows on the front and side, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The interior layout includes a visible living area with wood flooring, a bedroom, and a bathroom, as well as a small pool or hot tub area. The front entryway is marked by a double door flanked by two potted plants, and there is an attached garage with a dark gray gable roof. A small white van is parked outside, suggesting a residential urban setting. The house's clean lines and minimal ornamentation reflect a contemporary architectural style.
description: A modern, white house with large industrial windows, a mix of flat and gable roofs, and a visible interior featuring wood floors and a small pool area.
description_view_0: This view shows the rear and side of the house, highlighting the large industrial windows and a partial view of the interior living space and pool.
description_view_1: This angle reveals the side of the house with the garage and the white van parked outside, as well as the open interior layout with wood flooring.
description_view_2: The back of the house is visible here, dominated by the large gable roof over the garage and a clear view of the pool area inside.
description_view_3: The front of the house is shown, featuring the main entryway with double doors, potted plants, and large windows, as well as the attached garage.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large industrial-style windows
attribute_entryway_design: Double front doors with glass panels, flanked by potted plants, no porch, and a clean, minimal overhang.
